question: What air transportation infrastructure supports TUI's 6% summer booking increase to 14.7 million passengers and contributes to the 25% operating profit forecast?
answer: TUI-branded airplanes landing at airports support the transportation of 14.7 million summer passengers (a 6% year-on-year increase), contributing to the forecasted 25% operating profit growth.

video: A TUI-branded airplane lands on a runway surrounded by greenery and airport infrastructure.
text: Tui reported summer bookings increase of 6% year-on-year, totaling 14.7 million.
Tui forecast operating profit to increase by 25% this year.
